es.name: Calculadora de TAE (APR)
es.description: Convierte una tasa nominal en la tasa anual equivalente.
es.seo_description: Convierte una tasa nominal en la tasa anual equivalente. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantánea. Herramienta gratuita con fórmula y ejemplos.
es.example_label: Converting 9% nominal annual rate compounded monthly to effective annual rate (EAR/APR).
es.result_context: The apr of {apr}% is the effective annual rate, showing true cost including compounding effects.
mistakes: Comparing loans using nominal rates instead of effective rates
Not considering fees that increase true borrowing cost
Confusing APR with APY (APY includes compounding)
